case_title: TAGGART, WILLIAM E. JR. et al VS PARSONS, GERALD E. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAGGART, WILLIAM E. JR. HAWKINS, KAREN L. PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION DBA TAGGART & HAWKINS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARSONS, GERALD E. PARSONS, SUZANNE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,156.89 FILED BY TAGGART, WILLIAM E. JR. HAWKINS, KAREN L. PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION DBA TAGGART & HAWKINS AS TO DEFENDANT PARSONS, GERALD E. PARSONS, SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF AUG-30-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DEFT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE RESERVED FOR NOV 1, 1994 8:00 AM. PAID $10.00 CASH.
